CustomField.formula: OR( INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Pricing too high'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Budget Constraints'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Perceived Lack of ROI'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Service Quality'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Unresolved support issues'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Taken in House'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Change of Vendor'), INCLUDES(Termination_Reasons__c, 'Legal / Compliance Concerns') )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Evaluates if the termination reasons were service related.
CustomField.label: Is Termination Service Related?
